data.narrative: Created operational documentation for the URL Shortener service, including a service overview and three incident runbooks. Selected a linear checklist format to optimize usability during on-call incidents, then reviewed and refined the documentation after identifying documentation drift risks.

dimension_scores.evidence: Added deployment and rollback sections to docs/service-overview.md.

dimension_scores.observation: Included deployment verification and rollback workflow.
dimension_scores.evidence: Documented deployment verification using health endpoints.

dimension_scores.observation: Included health, readiness, metrics and logging guidance.
Identified documentation drift as a production risk and updated operational guidance.
dimension_scores.evidence: Reviewed runbooks to remove stale assumptions and ambiguous instructions.

dimension_scores.observation: Referenced graceful degradation and circuit breaker behavior during dependency failures.
dimension_scores.evidence: Dependency failure runbook documents fallback-oriented operational response.

dimension_scores.observation: Produced structured operational documentation for on-call engineers.
dimension_scores.evidence: Created docs/service-overview.md and three incident runbooks.

strengths: Produced complete operational documentation with structured runbooks.
Considered documentation drift and maintainability during updates.
data.recommendation: Carry the same operational discipline into deployment automation and verification in Module 08.

public_evidence.technical_detail: Purpose, dependencies, endpoints, configuration, deployment, rollback and ownership.
High error rate, high latency and dependency failure.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Shows ability to support production incidents.

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Selected a linear checklist and justified the decision.
Created a service overview and structured incident runbooks.
